name: Maui Teriyaki Chicken Wings (Deane)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lime juice, soy sauce, green onions, ginger, garlic, and sesame oil.
2. Place the chicken wings and marinade in a large resealable plastic bag. Turn the bag several times to ensure even coating, then seal tightly. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
3. Remove the wings from the marinade and reserve it for basting. Spread the wings as flat as possible on bamboo skewers.
4. Lightly sprinkle five-spice powder over both sides of the wings.
5. Thread one pineapple wedge onto each skewer.
6. Place the skewers on a rack in an oven preheated to 450°F (232°C). Bake for 15 minutes, then turn and bake until the chicken wings are browned and juices run clear when pierced with a sharp knife, about 10-15 more minutes.
7. Brush the wings several times with marinade during cooking. Alternatively, grill over hot coals until the wings are browned and juices run clear when pierced with a sharp knife, about 10-15 minutes per side.
